title: chambered
body:
created on july 17, 2021

https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/071721-chambered?in=billy-moreno/sets/scrub/s-f8srbarqnim&si=c068d073027b417c998c89f0ecb153fd

))}}

verse 1

mf doom but my mask is a black block on zoom
when they ask what i'm doing i ease into it
intuit what they mean and toss it back to em
plain and simple
muting as soon as i can playing with symbols
a mutant shaping sounds with my hands
i'm praying with cymbals
hunting for something sacrificial
so when i kill it y'all blessed by what i give you

verse 2

a ronin known for goin in alone an hoping an opening shows up in time for me to go home an hone
a homing pigeon prone to pidgin with a poem to pitch in a hymn to hum and a throne for shittin
shoulda shown the vision if you didn't want one bad throw to pitch it
jesusin the tempo
upend the pitcher
downsample the scripture
crush the competition
stretch the bars to fit ya
then reminisce over when it was all so simple
i was an awesome person with perfect dimples
until something awful happened my people called em pimples
then i kept picking at em when i needed something to get back into
i was an august person in the middle of winter
thawed autumn people were too temper-
ate cooled me to my center
fooled me into censured
thinking i needed a new flame to enter
the chamber of my true name
homie i came from the placenta
you rang
you needed a place to stay
you're the renter
but i'm no landlord or lender
what's not addressed properly simply returns to sender
